scripts.dev: pnpm dev:backend & pnpm --filter miniprogram dev:weapp & pnpm --filter backstage dev
scripts.prod: pnpm build:backstage && (pnpm dev:backend & pnpm --filter miniprogram dev:weapp & pnpm --filter backstage start)
scripts.dev:all: pnpm dev:backend & pnpm --filter miniprogram dev:weapp & pnpm --filter backstage dev
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run python main.py
